= .github
:description: GitHub Actions workflows, issue/discussion templates, and repository automation for paint.type.

This directory is part of the paint.type project.

== Purpose

GitHub Actions workflows, issue/discussion templates, and repository automation for paint.type.

As a Level 1 directory (`.github/`), it supports the overall project structure.
